globalGate.summary: All COORD-2 slices passed. ONE coordination-state source (lib/coord-state.mjs buildCoordState) now feeds the CLI, the agent digest, and a new read-only /coordination web view — proven to agree (CLI-UI-PARITY OK). Fixes: agent_mail leases folded into the digest+state (DIGEST-LEASES OK); agent_mail Garrison-supervised eager/standing with clean stop on deselect + restart action (AGENTMAIL-LIFECYCLE OK); durable ~/.garrison/snapshots backups + /tmp migrated (BACKUPS-DURABLE OK). The view's hero verdict is honest — agent_mail DOWN, a RED zero-write session, and a stale lock each force degraded (shown in view-degraded.png + the e2e), and an unreachable state source shows 'unknown', never stale green (COORD-VIEW OK). Gates: coord vitest 66 pass + 1 gated; full suite 845 pass / 6 pre-existing-baseline (zero coord); e2e 3/3; typecheck 0; lint clean; build 0 (14/14, /coordination + 3 API routes). Cross-model: two focused Codex reviews both approve. PTY-safe (Verify-now = `coord canary`, no model). License-isolated (leases via agent_mail HTTP MCP, never imported).
globalGate.preExistingBaseline: 6 full-suite failures unrelated to + unaffected by this wave (removed memory seed: claude-install, seed x3, validation, fitting-files-api; + 1 gemini-runtime buildArgs).
